data.raceName: COMFORT INN & SUITES NORTHGATE PACE MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. HEZA DIRTY DANCER did a good job to finish second two starts ago then recorded an effortless win last time out, scoring by 30 metres over 1780m at this track. Tackles a similar assignment and he can make it two on the trot. 1. WEE BONNIE registered another strong performance last start when she battled on bravely to finish third over 1660m at Albion Park. No excuses from this advantageous draw. Primary contender based on those recent efforts. 7. MULLUM JUDITH is in the mix following a respectable third at her most recent appearance over 1780m at this track. 8. DOUG STEWART is in the mix after turning in a better effort last start to finish third at Albion Park over 1660m.","runners":[5,1,7,8],"exclusive":false}
